title: MGN 672 (M) Extended dry-docking
body: "Notice to all shipowners, masters and UK Recognised Organisations.  This notice should be read in conjunction with:   The Merchant Shipping (Survey and Certification) Regulations 2015, Merchant Shipping Notice 1672 (M+F) (as amended), Merchant Shipping Notice 1751(M+F) (as amended) and Marine Guidance Note 546 (M) (as amended).  "
